nert 0.0.3.9000
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • collect_tern_data() — Vectorized Data Collection
    • Using nert to augment agricultural analytics with SMIPS data
  • Changelog

Package index

COG Readers

Functions to read Cloud Optimised GeoTIFF data from TERN.

read_tern()
Read TERN COG Datasets
read_smips()
Read SMIPS Daily Soil Moisture from TERN
read_asc()
Read ASC Soil Classification from TERN
read_aet()
Read AET Monthly Evapotranspiration from TERN
read_slga()
Read SLGA Soil Attributes from TERN
read_soil_diversity()
Read Soil Beta Diversity from TERN
read_canopy_height()
Read Canopy Height from TERN
read_phenology()
Read Land Surface Phenology from TERN

Batch Extraction

Extract values from multiple TERN datasets at locations over time.

collect_tern_data()
Collect TERN Data Over Time and Space

Utilities

Helper functions for working with TERN data.

get_key()
Get or Set Up API Key for TERN
reexports autoplot
Objects exported from other packages

Data

Example datasets bundled with the package.

grain
Synthetic dataset for a grain production experiment in South Australia

On this page

Developed by Adam H. Sparks, Wasin Pipattungsakul, Russell Edson, Sam Rogers, Max Moldovan, Grains Research and Development Corporation.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
